user_request: Find industrial design inspiration references for a travel-friendly manual coffee grinder with compact nesting geometry, knurled metal details, and premium tactile controls.

evaluation.design_direction_summary: Compact, cylindrical, premium utilitarian coffee accessory with ribbed grip surfaces, restrained black-and-silver CMF, and a clean mechanical hand-crank silhouette.
strengths: Strong travel-friendly vertical packaging and compact footprint
Clear tactile cueing from the ribbed/knurled-looking grip zone
Mechanical, functional aesthetic appropriate for coffee gear
Simple silhouette that communicates portability and manual operation
weaknesses: Visual language is more AeroPress accessory than dedicated grinder
Crank and top assembly feel a bit generic and lightweight
Limited evidence of true nesting geometry or collapsible detailing
Not especially distinctive or high-end in a sculptural sense
Some surfaces read smooth and plain rather than richly tactile
